scripts.preflight:pr: npm run lockfile:check && npm run lockfile:check:functions && npm run ops:firebase-config-guard && npm run ops:legacy-html-coverage && npm run ops:locale-rtl-parity && npm run seo:validate:markets && npm run ops:imports:case && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.build:astro: npm --prefix astro-site ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix astro-site run build
scripts.build:admin-v3: npm run ops:imports:case && npm --prefix admin-v3 ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix admin-v3 run build
scripts.seo:validate: npm run seo:validate:hreflang && npm run seo:validate:schema && npm run seo:validate:links && npm run seo:validate:keywords && npm run seo:validate:legal && npm run seo:validate:markets
scripts.release:verify: npm run preflight:pr && npm run build:astro && npm run seo:validate && npm run perf:asset-budget && npm run perf:render-blocking-css && npm run ops:cutover:smoke:strict
scripts.lighthouse:assert:mobile: node scripts/check-lighthouse-threshold.js reports/lighthouse/en-mobile.json && node scripts/check-lighthouse-threshold.js reports/lighthouse/ar-mobile.json
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run ops:firebase-config-guard && npm --prefix functions test
scripts.test:admin-v3: npm run build:astro && npm run build:admin-v3:hosting && playwright test --config=playwright.admin-v3.config.js
scripts.test:admin-v3:auth: npm run build:astro && npm run build:admin-v3:hosting && playwright test --config=playwright.admin-v3.auth.config.js
